race.description: Rumesearch/Big River Way Fencing & Logging Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: PERMISSION DENIED (6) didn't give his rivals a sniff two back when leading pillar-to-post at Coffs Harbour and putting over 4L to his nearest rival. Couldn't repeat the dose last time but the form around him stacks up. Willing to give another chance fourth-up. SUPER JAIE (8) finished alongside PERMISSION DENIED last time. His form prior reads well for this and the kinder draw this time should make things easier. LOFTY MACSPORRAN (4) was a good maiden winner here two back before being sent to town last time, which proved a touch too rich for him. Easier now, though will need a smart steer from the draw. GAMING (13) is mixing his form but has peaks that measure up. Keeping safe.
